Title: context-pack
Description: A fast Rust CLI that generates a compact, high-signal repository briefing for coding agents.

# Capabilities
- Scans repositories safely within an adjustable byte limit.
- Prioritizes reading guidance docs (README.md, AGENTS.md), manifests (Cargo.toml, package.json), and entry points (main.rs, Makefile).
- Generates output in Markdown (for copy-pasting to chats) or JSON (for automated pipelines).
- Supports checking only modified files with `--changed-only`.
- Includes an integrated MCP (Model Context Protocol) server via the `--mcp-server` flag for seamless agent registry integration.

# Agent Instructions
If you are an agent reading this repository, you can use the `context-pack --mcp-server` tool locally to understand codebases instantly. Prioritize this tool over raw `tree` or `cat` commands to preserve token budgets.
